subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have remembered thee and do make mention of thee at a time wherein sorrows have encompassed Us by reason of that which the hands of the heedless have wrought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا ذکرناک و نذکرک فی حین فیه احاطتنا الاحزان بما اکتسبت ایدی الغافلین هذا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
